name: Same APC check
description: 檢查是否是相同的APC OOC
output_schema: [{"key": "process_table", "type": "table", "label": "最近5次製程記錄", "columns": [{"key": "tool", "label": "機台", "type": "string"}, {"key": "step", "label": "步驟", "type": "string"}, {"key": "APC", "label": "APC ID", "type": "string"}, {"key": "is_OOC", "label": "是否OOC", "type": "boolean"}]}, {"key": "ooc_count", "type": "scalar", "label": "OOC次數", "unit": "次"}, {"key": "same_apc", "type": "badge", "label": "OOC是否同一APC"}]
